---

### Lab 5 – Hardware Switch detect lab

In this lab you will use an example program which detects the first and second hardware switches in easy68k. You will document and explain how the program works in your lab report. Finally you will modify the program so that it can detect the first 4 switches.

1. – Download the program lab-5-switch-detect.x86
2. – Launch easy68k and examine the program code
3. – Debug the code and examine and explain the registers used. 
4. – Use the snipping tool to extract the code listing in to your lab report and provide an explanation as to how the program works. Refer to line numbers or blocks of line numbers where appropriate.
5. – Modify the program so it detects the first 4 switches
6. –  Provide a copy of the modified program in your lab report and outline in your lab report the modifications made. Provide appropriate screen shots in your lab report.
7. – Please include an intro and conclusion and reflect upon how easy68k handles the hardware switches
